name: Summer Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet over moderate heat, cook the butter, olive oil, and garlic for about 1 minute. Do not brown the garlic.
2. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Sprinkle with salt, oregano, and parsley.
4. Pour in wine. Stir well to heat the wine; cover and keep warm off the heat.
5. Meanwhile, break spaghetti strands in half and cook according to package directions. Drain well.
6. Add mushroom sauce to cooked thin spaghetti, and toss well.
7. Serve on warmed plates. Accompany with Parmesan cheese and red peppers for those who want to sprinkle over the top.
